personal.name: Keertana P K
personal.title: Electronics Engineering Student | Data Analytics Enthusiast
personal.tagline: Blending electronics, data, and intelligent systems to create meaningful real-world solutions.
personal.bio: I am a final-year Electronics Engineering student with a strong interest in data analytics, intelligent systems, and applied engineering. I enjoy transforming complex data into actionable insights and building practical solutions that combine analytical thinking with engineering concepts.
personal.currentRole: Final-Year B.Tech Student at Ramaiah Institute of Technology
personal.currentRoleDescription: Focusing on data analytics, intelligent systems, and applied electronics through academic projects and hands-on implementations. Exploring real-time systems, machine learning, and data-driven problem solving.

about.title: About
sections: I am a final-year Electronics Engineering student at Ramaiah Institute of Technology with a growing passion for data analytics, intelligent systems, and real-world problem solving.

My work focuses on combining engineering fundamentals with data-driven approaches. I enjoy analyzing datasets, building machine learning models, and designing systems that are both practical and impactful.

I am particularly interested in roles related to data analytics, technology consulting, and intelligent system development where I can apply analytical thinking and continuously learn new technologies.

experience.title: Intern – Design Thinking with AI: Low-Code/No-Code
experience.company: InternAge (Eighth Note Internet Pvt. Ltd.), India
experience.description: Completed an internship focused on design thinking and AI-powered low-code/no-code tools. Explored how to build digital solutions using modern AI platforms and automation tools while solving real-world problems.

projects.title: Smart IoT Home Monitoring System
projects.description: Real-time monitoring system for environmental conditions using IoT sensors.
projects.longDescription: Designed a smart home monitoring system that tracks environmental parameters such as temperature and humidity using IoT sensors. The system processes data in real time and visualizes it through an interactive dashboard for better decision-making.

projects.title: Real-Time Network Intrusion Detection System
projects.description: Machine learning-based system for detecting malicious IoT traffic.
projects.longDescription: Developed a real-time intrusion detection system that analyzes network packets and classifies them as normal or malicious using machine learning models. Integrated visualization dashboards to monitor traffic patterns effectively.

projects.title: Consumer Electronics Market Data Analysis
projects.description: Data-driven insights into pricing and product trends.
projects.longDescription: Performed data cleaning, preprocessing, and visualization on a consumer electronics dataset to uncover trends in pricing, ratings, and specifications. Built interactive visualizations and applied regression analysis for predictive insights.

projects.title: Intelligent Traffic Pattern Analysis
projects.description: Analytics-based approach to study traffic congestion trends.
projects.longDescription: Developed a data analytics workflow to analyze historical traffic data and identify congestion patterns and peak hours. Demonstrates how analytics can support smarter urban planning and decision-making.

education.institution: Ramaiah Institute of Technology, Bengaluru, India

achievements.title: Research Paper – Compact Patch Antenna
achievements.description: Authored a research paper on the design and simulation of a compact microstrip patch antenna focusing on miniaturization and performance analysis.

activities.title: National Service Scheme (NSS)
activities.description: Actively participated in community service initiatives including outreach programs, social awareness campaigns, and campus engagement activities.
